prompt: Abstract minimalist logo design featuring the letters MM formed by a single continuous line that creates a circuit-like or digital signal pattern. The line art symbol is rendered in electric cyan (#00E3FF) on a pure black background (#0A0A0A). The continuous line flows and bends to clearly form two M shapes connected together, with clean geometric angles — resembling a digital waveform, circuit trace, or data signal. The line has consistent stroke width, clean sharp corners. To the right of the symbol, the text 'MM AGENCY.' appears in small clean white uppercase sans-serif type with the period in cyan. The overall feel is tech-forward, digital, intelligent — like a Silicon Valley or fintech brand identity. Minimalist, precise, mathematical. Vector-quality, 8K graphic design, professional brand identity presentation.
negative_prompt: gradients, noise, photography, human models, blurry text, watermarks, busy backgrounds, soft focus, hand-drawn, sketchy, grunge, vintage, retro, playful, cartoon, organic shapes, floral, ornamental, thick heavy lines, 3D effects, shadows, multiple colors beyond cyan white and black, busy, cluttered, low resolution, realistic
